description: Implement a code change with parallel review and testing

steps.title: Implement: {{task_description}}
acceptance: All output files created/modified as specified
steps.body:
## Task

[task id=t1 type=code]
[goal]{{task_description}}[/goal]
{{#each files_to_read}}[file read={{this}}]{{/each}}
[spec]{{spec_fields}}[/spec]
{{#each output_files}}[output-artifact path={{this}}]{{/each}}
[/task]

## Acceptance
[accept]
[check]Code implements the specified requirements[/check]
[check]All output files created/modified[/check]
[/accept]

steps.title: Review: {{task_description}}
steps.body:
## Task

[task id=t2 type=review]
[goal]Review: {{task_description}}[/goal]
[context-ref id=t1.artifacts]
[focus areas="{{focus_areas}}"]
[/task]

## Acceptance
[accept]
[check]Code reviewed for {{focus_areas}}[/check]
[check]Verdict provided[/check]
[/accept]

steps.title: Test: {{task_description}}
steps.body:
## Task

[task id=t3 type=test]
[goal]Test: {{task_description}}[/goal]
[context-ref id=t1.artifacts]
[/task]

## Acceptance
[accept]
[check]Tests written and executed[/check]
[check]Results documented[/check]
[/accept]
